briefs.title: WorkSafeBC Updates Helmet and Respirator Safety Standards — Two Deadlines to Know
briefs.summary: BC's workplace safety rules are being updated in two stages: respirator (breathing protection) standards upgrade to a newer CSA version, two older helmet standards are added as accepted options, and new rules around combustible dust and compressed air blowing take effect.
briefs.action_required: Audit your respirators and helmets now to confirm they meet the updated standards before April 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: WorkSafeBC updated helmet and respirator standards take effect — BC OHS Regulation
WorkSafeBC combustible dust and compressed air rules take effect — BC OHS Regulation

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Natural Resources, Labour & Employment
